rationale: This page contains a map of India highlighting various protected areas that have been in the news, including National Parks, Tiger Reserves, and Wildlife Sanctuaries. It serves as a visual summary for geographical and environmental study.
cleanedText:
8. PROTECTED AREAS IN NEWS
Protected Areas in News
List of Protected Areas highlighted on the map of India:
- Bhagirathi Eco Sensitive Zone (ESZ)
- Tsarap Chu Conservation Reserve
- Dudhwa Tiger Reserve (DTR)
- Salkhan Fossil Park
- Kaziranga National Park and Tiger Reserve
- Keibul Lamjao National Park
- Sundarbans Tiger Reserve (STR)
- Similipal Tiger Reserve
- Mahuadanr Wolf Sanctuary
- Male Mahadeshwara (MM) Hills Wildlife Sanctuary
- Agasthyamala Biosphere Reserve
- Thattekad Bird Sanctuary
- Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary
- Sahyadri Tiger Reserve
